member.name: T:HyperV.Core.Vhd.Services.VhdService
member.summary: VHD/VHDX operations using simplified Virtual Disk API Provides basic VHD manipulation capabilities without complex P/Invoke structures

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Vhd.Services.VhdService.AttachVirtualDisk(System.String,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Attaches a VHD/VHDX file to the system

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Vhd.Services.VhdService.DetachVirtualDisk(System.String)
member.summary: Detaches a VHD/VHDX file from the system

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Vhd.Services.VhdService.GetVirtualDiskInfo(System.String)
member.summary: Gets information about a VHD/VHDX file using basic file information
